author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Overwatch – Season 3: Into the Tiger's Den Official Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Step into Season 3: Tiger’s Den in Overwatch on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/overwatch-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1064-06&utm_id=P1064-06 

A new chapter in the Reign of Talon starts here with the arrival of the Damage Hero, Shion! As the Hashimoto Clan’s most terrifying elder, Shion brings a dangerous new arsenal to the battlefield with her dual semi-auto pistols and a motorcycle she can crash into her enemies. 

Battle through the streets of Tokyo in the all-new Hybrid Map, Neon Junction, filled with nods to Japanese culture and easter eggs around every corner.  

Unlock brand new cosmetics through the Season 3 Battle Pass and in the Shop like Illari’s Ascendant Phoenix Mythic Hero Skin, Hanzo’s Tokyo Rebel Mythic Weapon Skin, and much more.  

And in the new Anima Strike Meta Event, you can earn new rewards based on the path you choose! 

#Overwatch 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Digimon Story Time Stranger – How to Play Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Digimon Story Time Stranger releases July 10, 2026 on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch! Play the demo and pre-order today: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/digimon-story-time-stranger-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

Learn more about Digimon Story Time Stranger with Terriermon Assistant! Travel across time and parallel worlds in this turn-based RPG. 

Save data from the demo will transfer to the full game. Pre-order today and receive Agumon (Black), Gabumon (Black), and Uniform of a Certain School. 

#NintendoSwitch2 #NintendoSwitch #DigimonStoryTimeStranger 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

Subscribe for more Nintendo fun: https://goo.gl/HYYsot

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Minecraft – Chaos Cubed Trailer – Nintendo Switch
Play Minecraft's Chaos Cubed drop on Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/minecraft-switch/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1057-01&utm_id=P1057-01 

Meet your new friend: the sulfur cube! In Minecraft's Chaos Cubed drop, explore a new cave biome, build with colorful blocks, and unleash the sulfur cube’s weird, block-powered chaos. 

#NintendoSwitch #Minecraft 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Disney Dreamlight Valley – Honeyglow Woods Adventure Pack Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Disney Dreamlight Valley: Honeyglow Woods Adventure Pack launches July 8! Play Disney Dreamlight Valley on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/disney-dreamlight-valley-nintendo-switch-2-edition-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1064-02&utm_id=P1064-02 

Explore the Honeyglow Woods and reconnect with Disney's Winnie the Pooh, Eeyore, and Piglet in this brand-new Adventure Pack! Decorate 4 new areas, learn the art of beekeeping, craft all-new items using Golden Honey, and uncover the mystery behind the Everoak Tree. 

#DisneyDreamlightValley #HoneyglowWoods 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s

author: Nintendo of America YouTube
text:
Trine 6: Together in Time – Announcement Trailer – Nintendo Switch 2
Trine 6: Together in Time is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch on September 17, 2026: https://www.nintendo.com/us/store/products/trine-6-together-in-time-switch-2/?utm_source=SW&utm_medium=soytnoa&utm_campaign=P1021-01&utm_id=P1021-01 

Trine 6: Together in Time is a co-op puzzle platformer for 1-4 players. Solve perplexing puzzles, fight cunning creatures, and traverse perilous paths in your adventure through Trine’s fantasy world. 

#NintendoSwitch2 #NintendoSwitch #Trine6 

Visit Nintendo.com for more info: https://ninten.do/6008Spp2s
